text: Light mode is too bright. We can use Gruvbox Light Soft colors in combo with colors and fonts we have.
Btw, we do not need ordering numbers (#1, #2) here in chat. Order of messages speaks for itself.

I see that this is very valuable instrument for Loom in general. We should make it as a part of Loom when activated (by default). However, it means work for Loom CLI and better store. Also we should add Loom's own MCP if it fits. Let's discuss this.
This annotation chat should be resizable. And this input must grow with input to to some set limit.

We should split our corpora into two — docs and source. And reflect here in menu as Docs and Source. Docs must be looms which address readers and loom users needs. Source is actual open source of Loom which is by itself learning material.
Let's capitalise buttons in annotation utility.
This is off to the right. If it is a quote than it is not styled properly.
label: p "install the tool, write your first loom,"

text: Btw, integrating AU with Loom means that Woven Site data should carry source anchors metadata (let's think on design). Then anyone using Loom can use them to annotate looms as specs, not just DOMs.
Btw, AU chat input draft must survive reloads which eventually happen time to time unexpectedly.
Does not have items. Should have. But this is after weave command refactor
